summaries.summary: The beta release checklist captured the current install blockers, the first-launch seed expectations, and the minimum release gate for setup.exe.
The mirror digest captured a calm work rhythm: one active packaging task, one authorization checkpoint, and two completed workspace documents ready for review.

retrieval_hits.summary: Use the latest release checklist when validating the installer output.
Keep the mirror digest aligned with the seeded dashboard and notes copy.
